name: the-puppeteer
description: VeigaPunk The Puppeteer plugin for Codex marketplace access.

interface.shortDescription: Web UI task execution and long-running assistant flows
interface.longDescription: Uses the Puppeteer/ChatGPT bridge to execute long-running web-app workflows and hand back task completion state for Codex users.
